description: Create a scheduled GitHub Actions workflow named Translation statistics that runs every 2nd of the month at 06:00 UTC and can be manually triggered. For the repository 3liz/QuickOSM, set up an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the master branch with a bot token, installs Python 3.10, installs the requests library, runs a script to report translation statistics to Transifex, and commits the changes with a bot's credentials.
